title: Approved higher technical qualifications
body: " This guidance has been transferred from the previous skills body the Institute for Apprenticeships and Technical Education (IfATE) following its closure. The guidance is under review and may be subject to change.   Approved HTQs align to Skills England’s occupational standards.     We may:    review qualifications at any time withdraw approval following a review if our approval requirements are no longer met   "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
